_doc: Provenance for every visual asset. Update when swapping in real photos from Gracie's IG or Higgsfield gens. All entries marked _placeholder until Nicholas swaps in real files.

plate-matte.webp._brief: Black sedan, matte/oxidised finish, low golden-hour light

plate-satin.webp._brief: Same sedan, partially polished, satin reflection

plate-mirror.webp._brief: Same sedan, full ceramic mirror reflection, garage-light highlights

gallery._note: Slots 01-15. Pull from @goldycardetailing IG (logged-in download). Each entry should record post URL + capture date once real.

process._note: Slots 01-05. Best from her own work-in-progress shots. Higgsfield fallback for any she doesn't have (e.g. paint gauge close-up if she doesn't shoot tool shots).

gracie.webp._brief: Portrait — Gracie at work, golden hour lighting if possible. Real photo only — never AI-generate a person.

logo._note: If Gracie has a logo, drop SVG here. Otherwise we ship with type-only wordmark and add logo later.

og-image.jpg._brief: 1200x630, gold-on-black, wordmark + tagline. Final asset generated after hero is locked.
